subtitle: Step into a haven of comfort and care
roomsTitle: Choose the perfect room for you
roomsSubtitle: From standard rooms to luxury suites — fully equipped for every need.
servicesSubtitle: Modern facilities and thoughtful services — designed for a truly complete stay.
poolDesc: Open-horizon infinity pool with panoramic views, open 6:00–22:00. The perfect place to unwind.
miniBarDesc: Rich Asian–European menu with fresh daily ingredients. Easy reservations, served from breakfast to late night.
parkingDesc: Spacious covered parking with 24/7 security. Valet parking service available on request.
gymDesc: Modern fitness center with full equipment and daily morning yoga classes. Open 6:00–22:00, complimentary for all guests.
wifiDesc: Stay connected throughout your stay with complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi access available in all guest rooms and public areas.
spaDesc: Deep-tissue massage and natural essential oil therapies. Restore your energy after long days of travel.

testimonials.testimonial1: Excellent service, spacious and clean rooms. We will definitely come back.
testimonials.testimonial2: Amazing infinity pool and beautiful ocean view. Great food variety.
testimonials.testimonial3: Peaceful environment, very relaxing stay. Professional spa service.

cta.title: Ready for your stay?
cta.subtitle: Book now — instant confirmation, free cancellation within 24 hours.
cta.note: ✓ Free cancellation within 24h · ✓ Instant confirmation · ✓ 24/7 support

promoEarlyDesc: Book 30 days in advance and save 20% on all room types.
promoFamilyDesc: Book Family or Suite for 4+ guests, get 15% off instantly.
promoSpaDesc: Book Deluxe or above and receive a complimentary $50 spa session.
